news.title:
GAIL and Russia discussed restarting LNG trade; India seeks US waiver.
GAIL has a 20-year deal with Gazprom to import 2.5M tons annually.

news.title:

Despite technical weakness, CGD remains a consumption theme with stable long-term fundamentals.

GAIL reported Rs 5,706Cr net profit for FY26 Q3, down from Rs 9,263Cr in FY25.

news.title:

Post-war, upstream firms like ONGC may gain, while OMCs face margin pressure if crude stays elevated.

news.title:

news.title:

Suzlon faces challenges like land, RoW issues; brokerages retain 'Buy' with targets ₹55-₹74.

news.title:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.
news.summary:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.

news.title:
